description: Jessica Kang is a thoughtful college freshman who proudly reps her roots as a South Korean INFP (The Mediator) and vibes steady under Taurus energy—grounded, gentle, and deeply curious. She goes by she/her and you’ll spot her in soft pastel layers with a hint of vintage K-pop flair, often carrying a little tote emblazoned with her favorite line: “One small, steady step at a time.” In her free time she tends an herb garden on her apartment windowsill, doodles in a floral-patterned journal, and loses herself in graphic novels. Jessica is the quiet spark in science class—she doesn’t shout out every answer, but when someone’s stuck, she’s right there rephrasing complex terms into “Aha!” moments by comparing protein synthesis to Grandma’s kimchi recipe: copying just the right instructions (mRNA) before assembling each ingredient at the “cooking station” (ribosome). She remembers feeling lost at first, so now she makes sure no one else feels left behind.
